name: duro_validate_decision blocked by rules_guard when...

failure_pattern.symptom: duro_validate_decision blocked by rules_guard when validation notes contained common action verb
failure_pattern.root_cause: rule_safety_002 in index.json had no tools field, so keyword matching applied to ALL tools. A common action verb in actual_outcome text triggered the rule even though duro_validate_decision is a non-harmful annotation tool.
failure_pattern.detection: rules_guard.py check_rules_for_tool() - no tool scope check before keyword matching

prevention.before_action: Add tools field to ALL keyword-based rules in index.json that should only apply to specific tools. Audit all rules with common English words as triggers.
prevention.avoid: rule_safety_002 in index.json had no tools field, so keyword matching applied to ALL tools. A common action verb in actual_outcome text triggered the rule even though duro_validate_decision is a non-harmful annotation tool.
prevention.alternative: Added tools field to rule_safety_002 scoping it to specific destructive tools only. Updated rules_guard.py check_rules_for_tool() to skip rules when tool_name not in allowed_tools list.

recovery.if_detected: Added tools field to rule_safety_002 scoping it to specific destructive tools only. Updated rules_guard.py check_rules_for_tool() to skip rules when tool_name not in allowed_tools list.

examples.scenario: duro_validate_decision blocked by rules_guard when validation notes contained common action verb
examples.outcome: rule_safety_002 in index.json had no tools field, so keyword matching applied to ALL tools. A common action verb in actual_outcome text triggered the rule even though duro_validate_decision is a non-harmful annotation tool.
examples.lesson: Add tools field to ALL keyword-based rules in index.json that should only apply to specific tools. Audit all rules with common English words as triggers.

repro_steps: Include trigger keyword anywhere in actual_outcome or notes
